title: Job 38: The Voice from the Whirlwind
description: God answers Job out of the whirlwind — not with explanations but with questions about the foundations of the cosmos.
introduction: God answers Job out of the whirlwind — not with explanations but with questions about the foundations of the cosmos.

translation.original_text: τίς οὗτος ὁ κρύπτων μέ βουλήν ἐν λόγοις; ... ποῦ ἦς ἐν τῷ θεμελιοῦν μέ τὴν γῆν;
translation.text: Who is this who darkens counsel by words without knowledge?... Where were you when I laid the foundation of the earth?

translation.original_text: ἐπίστασαι δὲ τροπὰς οὐρανοῦ ἢ τὰ ὑπ᾿ οὐρανὸν ὁμοθυμαδὸν γινόμενα;
translation.text: Do you know the ordinances of the heavens? Can you establish their rule on the earth?
